title: Create: Linked Icons
description: Easy to craft alphanumeric and directional icons for your redstone links. No more color codes!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2fc1916bafa1705ff05200734d6f548e7a1e2c2.png)

# Info
Adds icons for your Create Redstone links. I made this mainly for aeronautics, since I couldn't figure out what to use for left and right in my links lol. Normally you would have to use color codes, but that can get confusing fast.

# Included icons
1. Numbers 0-9
2. Capital letters A-Z
3. Up, down, left, and right arrows.

<details>
<summary>All icons</summary>

![Icons included in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec471a30686b502fc0d3d2beaa88b3a5c00d69df.png)

</details>


# Crafting
All icons are crafted with one iron nugget in the Stonecutter.
